ucs.title: [LLM] TeamTNT cloud-credential & IMDS scrape from Linux shell (Chimaera / Black-T pattern)
ucs.description: Hunts the signature TeamTNT post-compromise enumeration loop on a compromised Linux/container host: shell scripts (Chimaera, ezgo.sh, init.sh, Hildegard) curling the cloud Instance Metadata Service and grepping ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.docker/config.json, ~/.kube/config and SSH keys to feed the worm's lateral movement. This is TeamTNT's hallmark — virtually every public Cado / Trend Micro / Unit42 report on the actor (Hildegard, Black-T, Chimaera, Kangaroo) shows the same credential-sweep sequence.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os="Linux" (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl") OR Processes.process_name IN ("curl","wget","cat","grep","find","awk","sed")) (Processes.process="*169.254.169.254*" OR Processes.process="*metadata.google.internal*" OR Processes.process="*metadata.azure.com*" OR Processes.process="*/.aws/credentials*" OR Processes.process="*/.aws/config*" OR Processes.process="*/.docker/config.json*" OR Processes.process="*/.kube/config*" OR Processes.process="*id_rsa*" OR Processes.process="*authorized_keys*" OR Processes.process="*known_hosts*") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name | rename Processes.* as * | stats dc(eval(case(match(cmdline,"169\.254|metadata\."),"imds",match(cmdline,"\.aws|\.docker|\.kube"),"cloud_creds",match(cmdline,"id_rsa|authorized_keys|known_hosts"),"ssh_keys"))) as distinct_cred_categories values(cmdline) as cmdlines values(parent) as parents min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by host user | where distinct_cred_categories>=2 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// TeamTNT (G0139) — Chimaera/Black-T credential & IMDS sweep on Linux
let _imds = dynamic(["169.254.169.254","metadata.google.internal","metadata.azure.com","100.100.100.200"]);
let _cred_files = dynamic(["/.aws/credentials","/.aws/config","/.docker/config.json","/.kube/config","/.azure/accessTokens.json","/.s3cfg","/.ovhconfig"]);
let _ssh_files  = dynamic(["id_rsa","id_ed25519","authorized_keys","known_hosts"]);
let _shell_parents = dynamic(["bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl"]);
let _read_tools = dynamic(["curl","wget","cat","grep","egrep","awk","sed","find","tar","base64"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_shell_parents) or FileName in~ (_read_tools)
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| extend HitIMDS  = iff(cmd has_any (_imds), 1, 0)
| extend HitCreds = iff(cmd has_any (_cred_files), 1, 0)
| extend HitSsh   = iff(cmd has_any (_ssh_files), 1, 0)
| where HitIMDS + HitCreds + HitSsh > 0
// promote to alert when the host shows >=2 categories within an hour — the worm signature
| summarize FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp),
            Categories=sum(HitIMDS) + sum(HitCreds) + sum(HitSsh),
            DistinctCategories = dcount(case(HitIMDS==1,"imds",HitCreds==1,"creds",HitSsh==1,"ssh","")),
            SampleCmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents=make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
            Users=make_set(AccountName, 10)
            by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, 1h)
| where DistinctCategories >= 2     // 2+ distinct credential targets in 1h = TeamTNT loop
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// TeamTNT (G0139) — Chimaera/Black-T credential & IMDS sweep on Linux (ASIM)
let _imds = dynamic(["169.254.169.254","metadata.google.internal","metadata.azure.com","100.100.100.200"]);
let _cred_files = dynamic(["/.aws/credentials","/.aws/config","/.docker/config.json","/.kube/config","/.azure/accessTokens.json","/.s3cfg","/.ovhconfig"]);
let _ssh_files  = dynamic(["id_rsa","id_ed25519","authorized_keys","known_hosts"]);
let _shell_parents = dynamic(["bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl"]);
let _read_tools = dynamic(["curl","wget","cat","grep","egrep","awk","sed","find","tar","base64"]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DvcOs has "Linux" or ParentProcessName in~ (_shell_parents)
| where ParentProcessName in~ (_shell_parents) or TargetProcessName in~ (_read_tools)
| extend cmd = tolower(TargetProcessCommandLine)
| extend HitIMDS  = iff(cmd has_any (_imds), 1, 0)
| extend HitCreds = iff(cmd has_any (_cred_files), 1, 0)
| extend HitSsh   = iff(cmd has_any (_ssh_files), 1, 0)
| where HitIMDS + HitCreds + HitSsh > 0
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctCategories = dcount(case(HitIMDS==1,"imds",HitCreds==1,"creds",HitSsh==1,"ssh","")),
            SampleCmds=make_set(TargetProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents=make_set(ParentProcessName, 10),
            Users=make_set(ActorUsername, 10)
            by DvcHostname, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctCategories >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: TeamTNT Cloud Credential and IMDS Sweep on Linux
id: 7c1e3b8a-2c5e-4a9c-9c8e-teamtntcredsweep
status: experimental
description: Detects the TeamTNT (G0139) Chimaera/Black-T worm's credential harvesting loop — a Linux shell or interpreter spawning IMDS-aware tools (curl/wget) or read tools (cat/grep/find) against AWS/Docker/Kube credential files and SSH keys.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0139/
  - https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/22/k/security-breaks-teamtnts-dockerhub-credentials-leak.html
  - https://www.cadosecurity.com/teamtnt-the-first-crypto-mining-worm-to-steal-aws-credentials/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1552.001
  - attack.t1552.004
  - attack.t1552.005
  - attack.g0139
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: process_creation
detection:
  parent_shell:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '/bash'
      - '/sh'
      - '/dash'
      - '/ash'
      - '/zsh'
      - '/python'
      - '/python3'
      - '/perl'
  read_tool:
    Image|endswith:
      - '/curl'
      - '/wget'
      - '/cat'
      - '/grep'
      - '/awk'
      - '/sed'
      - '/find'
      - '/tar'
      - '/base64'
  cmdline_targets:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '169.254.169.254'
      - 'metadata.google.internal'
      - 'metadata.azure.com'
      - '/.aws/credentials'
      - '/.aws/config'
      - '/.docker/config.json'
      - '/.kube/config'
      - '/.azure/accessTokens.json'
      - '/.s3cfg'
      - 'id_rsa'
      - 'id_ed25519'
      - 'authorized_keys'
  condition: (parent_shell or read_tool) and cmdline_targets
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate cloud-init / packer / Ansible runs that read IMDS
  - DevOps engineers manually inspecting their own credential files
level: high
ucs.rationale: TeamTNT is the originator of the AWS-credentials-stealing worm pattern (Cado Security, Aug 2020) and every subsequent variant (Black-T, Hildegard, Chimaera, Kangaroo, TNTbotinger) re-uses an almost identical bash loop: curl IMDS → cat ~/.aws → cat ~/.docker → grep id_rsa → exfil. Requiring 2+ distinct credential categories in a 1-hour window from a shell/interpreter parent collapses sysadmin noise
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] TeamTNT container escape / Docker-API abuse spawning XMRig (Hildegard / Kinsing-style miner deploy)
ucs.description: Catches the second half of the TeamTNT kill chain: a privileged container launch (--privileged, host PID/network/FS mount) or kubelet/Docker-socket abuse that immediately spawns mass-scan tooling (masscan/zgrab/pnscan) and/or an XMRig-family miner (xmrig, kdevtmpfsi, kinsing) — exactly the Hildegard, TNTbotinger and Chimaera execution chains documented by Unit42 and Lacework.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os="Linux" (Processes.process_name IN ("xmrig","kdevtmpfsi","kinsing","minerd","masscan","zgrab","pnscan","zmap") OR Processes.process="*--donate-level*" OR Processes.process="*stratum+tcp://*" OR Processes.process="*xmr.pool*" OR Processes.process="*nanopool*" OR Processes.process="*moneroocean*" OR (Processes.process_name="docker" AND (Processes.process="*--privileged*" OR Processes.process="*-v /:/*" OR Processes.process="*--pid=host*" OR Processes.process="*--net=host*" OR Processes.process="*/var/run/docker.sock*")) OR (Processes.process="*kubectl*" AND Processes.process="*exec*" AND Processes.process="*--privileged*") OR Processes.process="*chroot /host*" OR Processes.process="*nsenter --target 1*") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name | rename Processes.* as * | eval activity=case(match(cmdline,"xmrig|kdevtmpfsi|kinsing|donate-level|stratum\+tcp|xmr\.pool|nanopool|moneroocean|minerd"),"miner", match(cmdline,"masscan|zgrab|pnscan|zmap"),"scanner", match(cmdline,"--privileged|-v /:/|--pid=host|--net=host|docker\.sock|chroot /host|nsenter --target 1"),"escape") | stats dc(activity) as stages values(activity) as stages_seen values(cmdline) as cmdlines values(parent) as parents min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by host user | where stages>=2 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// TeamTNT (G0139) — Hildegard/Chimaera container-escape -> scan -> XMRig chain
let _miner_bins   = dynamic(["xmrig","kdevtmpfsi","kinsing","minerd","xmrig-cuda","xmrig-nvidia","sysrv","xmrigminer"]);
let _miner_tokens = dynamic(["--donate-level","stratum+tcp://","xmr.pool","nanopool","moneroocean","supportxmr","--cpu-priority","--coin monero","randomx"]);
let _scan_bins    = dynamic(["masscan","zgrab","pnscan","zmap"]);
let _escape_tokens = dynamic(["--privileged","-v /:/"," -v /:/host","--pid=host","--net=host","--ipc=host","/var/run/docker.sock","chroot /host","nsenter --target 1","--mount type=bind,source=/,target=/"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine), fname = tolower(FileName)
| extend Activity = case(
    fname in (_miner_bins) or cmd has_any (_miner_tokens), "miner",
    fname in (_scan_bins),                                   "scanner",
    cmd has_any (_escape_tokens),                            "escape",
    "")
| where Activity != ""
// require chain: escape OR scanner accompanied by miner within 1h on same host
| summarize FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp),
            Stages=make_set(Activity),
            StageCount=dcount(Activity),
            SampleCmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 30),
            Parents=make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
            Users=make_set(AccountName, 10),
            ChildBins=make_set(FileName, 20)
            by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, 1h)
| where StageCount >= 2 or (StageCount == 1 and Stages has "miner")  // miner alone is enough; chain raises fidelity
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// TeamTNT (G0139) — Hildegard/Chimaera container-escape -> XMRig chain (ASIM)
let _miner_bins   = dynamic(["xmrig","kdevtmpfsi","kinsing","minerd","xmrig-cuda","sysrv","xmrigminer"]);
let _miner_tokens = dynamic(["--donate-level","stratum+tcp://","xmr.pool","nanopool","moneroocean","supportxmr","--cpu-priority","--coin monero","randomx"]);
let _scan_bins    = dynamic(["masscan","zgrab","pnscan","zmap"]);
let _escape_tokens = dynamic(["--privileged","-v /:/"," -v /:/host","--pid=host","--net=host","--ipc=host","/var/run/docker.sock","chroot /host","nsenter --target 1"]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| extend cmd = tolower(TargetProcessCommandLine), fname = tolower(TargetProcessName)
| extend Activity = case(
    fname has_any (_miner_bins) or cmd has_any (_miner_tokens), "miner",
    fname has_any (_scan_bins),                                   "scanner",
    cmd has_any (_escape_tokens),                                 "escape",
    "")
| where Activity != ""
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated),
            Stages=make_set(Activity),
            StageCount=dcount(Activity),
            SampleCmds=make_set(TargetProcessCommandLine, 30),
            Parents=make_set(ParentProcessName, 10),
            Users=make_set(ActorUsername, 10),
            ChildBins=make_set(TargetProcessName, 20)
            by DvcHostname, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where StageCount >= 2 or (StageCount == 1 and Stages has "miner")
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: TeamTNT's defining behaviour across Hildegard (Unit42), TNTbotinger, Chimaera (AT&T Alien Labs) and Kangaroo is the same three-stage chain on a Linux/container host: (1) escape via privileged docker run / exposed Docker socket / kubelet abuse, (2) launch masscan or pnscan to find the next victim, (3) drop XMRig (or kdevtmpfsi/kinsing) pointed at moneroocean/nanopool with --donate-level=1. Requirin
